LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF SYNCHRONY BANK FKA GE CAPITAL BANK'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE IS GRANTED. THIS CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY. PLAINTIFF TO PAY ALL TRANSFER COSTS. PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN GOOD CAUSE FOR ITS REQUEST TO TRANSFER. THE MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF SYNCHRONY BANK FKA GE CAPITAL BANK's MOTION TO TRANSFER venue is granted. This case is transferred to San Mateo County. Plaintiff to pay all transfer costs. Plaintiff has shown good cause for its request to transfer. The moving party is to submit a proposed order that repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
